decisions.mvpScope: visualization-first copilot (v2.0): 9 graphs (incl. Volcano/PCA/KM) + rule+AI recommend + Vision Review + Improve/Apply; chat/legend/tables/omics-suites trimmed to v1.1+
decisions.llm: Claude API (Anthropic, vision) — required for MVP AI features; visualization+export degrade gracefully without it

history.note: MVP narrowed to visualization-first workflow; rule-based chart suggestions, quick-start templates, and TIFF 300dpi export retained to avoid over-reduction.

v2.0: restored AI copilot core (rule+AI recommend, Vision Review, Improve/Apply) and bio graphs (Volcano/PCA/KM, 9 total CRAN-only); kept chat/legend/tables/omics-suites trimmed to v1.1+. Preserved Codex UX/safety/structure.
